Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-22-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Thomas Caudill, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Patelco Credit Union, a State Chartered Credit Union.
Loreaner Lopez, Collections Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Vitali Barkouski, an individual.
Default was entered against defendant on October 1, 2009. Amended Default was entered against defendant on October 13, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 13, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Patelco Credit Uninon, a State Chartered Credit Union, and against the Defaulted Defendant Vitalie Barkouski, an individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $30,043.94.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,741.70.
Costs - $530.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $33,315.64.

Additionally, the Court Ordered that plaintiff is the owner of the property described in paragraph 3 of the Judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
